constants.name: request
constants.value: InferenceRequest(request_id=request_id, model_id=model_id, input_data=input_data, callback=callback, priority=priority, timeout=timeout)

constants.name: completed_results
constants.value: [r for r in self.results.values() if r.status == InferenceStatus.COMPLETED and r.processing_time > 0]

constants.name: avg_time
constants.value: sum((r.processing_time for r in completed_results)) / len(completed_results)

constants.name: cached_results
constants.value: [r for r in self.inference_cache.values() if r.processing_time > 0]

constants.name: avg_time
constants.value: sum((r.processing_time for r in cached_results)) / len(cached_results)

classes.name: HybridLoader
classes.docstring:
混合配置加载器，支持按优先级合并多个来源的配置

示例用法:
    loaders = [
        (JSONLoader(), 100),  # 高优先级
        (EnvLoader(), 50),    # 中优先级
        (YAMLLoader(), 10)    # 低优先级
    ]
    loader = HybridLoader(loaders)
    config = loader.load('app_config')

constants.name: avg_score
constants.value: sum((r.overall_score for r in reports.values())) / total_docs

constants.name: high_quality
constants.value: sum((1 for r in reports.values() if r.overall_score >= 80))

constants.name: medium_quality
constants.value: sum((1 for r in reports.values() if 60 <= r.overall_score < 80))

constants.name: low_quality
constants.value: sum((1 for r in reports.values() if r.overall_score < 60))

constants.name: summary
constants.value: {'total_documents': total_docs, 'average_score': round(avg_score, 2), 'quality_distribution': {'high': high_quality, 'medium': medium_quality, 'low': low_quality}, 'common_issues': dict(sorted(issue_counts.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:10]), 'top_documents': [path for (path, _) in sorted_reports[:5]], 'bottom_documents': [path for (path, _) in sorted_reports[-5:]], 'generated_at': datetime.now().isoformat()}

constants.value: 2 * (precision * recall) / (precision + recall) if precision + recall > 0 else 0

quick_start.title: 基础设施层快速开始指南

sections.title: 安装和配置
content: 2. 安装项目依赖: pip install -r requirements.txt
3. 配置环境变量或配置文件
4. 运行测试验证安装: python scripts/testing/run_tests.py

sections.title: 示例代码
sections.code:
from src.infrastructure.config import ConfigManager
from src.infrastructure.logging import UnifiedLoggingInterface
from src.infrastructure.monitoring import MonitoringService

# 初始化配置
config = ConfigManager()
config.load_config('config/app.json')

# 设置日志
logging = UnifiedLoggingInterface()
logging.setup_logging(config.get('logging'))

# 启动监控
monitor = MonitoringService()
monitor.start_monitoring()

sections.title: 配置文件格式
content: 支持配置验证和默认值
